reviews.comment:
Muy riesgoso el lugar para hacer fila sobre Avenida Beiro.
La ubicación del cargador de aire es muy inconveniente, si uno ya cargo combustible tiene que hacer complicadas maniobras lo para poder lograrlo.

(Translated by Google)
The queuing area on Avenida Beiro is very risky.
The location of the air pump is very inconvenient; if you've already filled up with fuel, you have to perform complicated maneuvers to reach it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1X2Jla0RREAE

reviews.comment:
Cordialidad y buena atención.  Gracias! El problema es q la  espera se debe hacer "en doble fila" sobre Av. Beiró. Entorpeciendo el flujo del tránsito.

(Translated by Google)
Friendly and helpful. Thank you! The problem is that the wait has to be done in a double line on Beiró Avenue, obstructing the flow of traffic.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPcDlubjB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Generalmente cargo en estaciones de servicio de YPF . Buen trato y las que son ACA tienen un descuento adicional para socios tanto en combustibles como en la cafetería.
Nunca tuve inconvenientes con la calidad de los productos, aclaro esto porque leo comentarios que objetan la misma y en mi caso con varios vehículos y muchos años nunca un problema.

(Translated by Google)
I usually fill up at YPF gas stations. They offer good service, and those affiliated with ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) offer an additional discount for members on both fuel and in the cafeteria. I've never had any problems with the quality of their products. I mention this because I've read comments criticizing them, but in my experience, with several vehicles and many years of use, I've never had an issue.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1eTd1UnJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Derramó nafta porque no corto el surtidor y no me dijo nada, tampoco me hizo descuento ni me agregó demás, igual nunca me había pasado y cargo siempre ahí.

(Translated by Google)
He spilled gas because he didn't turn off the pump and he didn't say anything to me, nor did he give me a discount or add extra fuel. It had never happened to me before and I always fill up there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1bmNhMFB3EAE
